headline: Adobe (ADBE) Brings LiveRamp Purchase Data Into GenStudio For Commerce Media
summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) has integrated LiveRamp data into Adobe GenStudio for commerce media networks. The partnership connects LiveRamp's commerce purchase data with GenStudio's AI tools for creative production and targeting. Brands can use real purchase behavior to reach high intent shoppers while streamlining content workflows. Adobe is using this LiveRamp partnership to tie its GenStudio content tools more directly to the commerce media segment. For brands and retailers, the appeal is the...

headline: BofA resumes Adobe coverage with Underperform rating despite low valuation (ADBE)
summary: Bank sees AI creating long-term competitive challengesBank of America has reinstated coverage of Adobe (NASDAQ:ADBE) with an Underperform rating and a $190 price target, arguing that while the stock appears inexpensive, the company’s competitive position is increasingly under pressure from generative artificial intelligence. Analysts led by Tal Liani based the valuation on seven times Adobe’s projected 2027 enterprise value to free cash flow (EV/FCF), below the approximately 9.

Analysts led by Tal Liani based the valuation on seven times Adobe’s projected 2027 enterprise value to free cash flow (EV/FCF), below the approximately 9.

headline: ‘Cheap but fundamentally challenged’: BofA reinstates Adobe at Underperform
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America on Tuesday reinstated coverage of Adobe with an Underperform rating and a $190 price objective, arguing that generative AI is eroding the software maker’s competitive position even though its stock trades near the bottom of its historical valuation range.
